content: Piper: Fuck, Codsworth, you ever think about how the Brotherhood would lose their power-armored fucking minds if they saw MJR rail me while a synth records it for Publick Occurrences? Equality porn—showing that love isn’t just for human purist pricks. Codsworth: Oh dear, madam, such…  expressions! Though I must say, the Brotherhood's prudishness is quite hypocritical given their  collections of pre-war smut. Found a stash in a Vertibird wreck once—dog-eared pages and all. Piper: Ha! Bet their Paladins jerk off in those metal suits, praying no one hears the hydraulics squeak. Meanwhile, MJR’s gonna bend me over that rusted car hood later and give the settlers a  show. Cait better not hog him this time. Codsworth: Ahem. If I may, the real scandal is how synth whores in Goodneighbor charge  for fisting since the Institute fell. Supply and demand, but really—capitalism at its most .

Piper: Fuck capitalism, Codsworth—next issue’s gonna be a free love manifesto with MJR’s dick pics as the centerfold. Brotherhood can choke on their own hypocrisy while I choke on something better. Codsworth: Quite the revolutionary, madam. Just… do mind the rust on that car hood. Tetanus isn’t as sexy as you think.

Cait: Ugh, fuckin’ smell that? Smells like a pack of feral ghouls just had an orgy in that sewer pipe. Makes me wanna puke... or maybe fuck, honestly. Dunno which yet. Codsworth: Oh my stars, Mistress Cait! You always have such a... colorful way with words. Though I must say, the radiation does tend to amp up the more...  urges in all of us, doesn’t it? Cait: Look at you, ya rusty fuckin’ toaster, talkin’ about primal urges. Bet you’d polish MJR’s combat rifle ‘til it  if he asked, huh? Codsworth: properrobot*—and I would never engage in such vulgar maintenance... unless specifically instructed, of course. Cait: Oh, don’t act all high and mighty, ya tin can. Saw the way your circuits lit up when Piper was bent over that ammo crate yesterday.

Cait: Well fuck me sideways, you actually killed that flying cocksucker. Maybe there’s hope for you yet, rustbucket. Codsworth: Why, thank you, Mistress Cait! Though I must admit, I do prefer polishing silver to dismembering wildlife. But needs must in this savage wasteland. Cait: Savage my ass. Saw you twirling those buzzsaws like a damn stripper at the Third Rail. Admit it—you get off on the carnage. Codsworth: Now, shall we return to the matter of MJR’s… weapon maintenance, or would you rather fantasize about him ramming that fat barrel of his down some raider’s throat again? Cait: Oh you slick metal fucker, you  pay attention. Alright, I’ll bite—but only ‘cause I know you’re imagining his combat shotgun between your clamps right now.

Cait: Fuck me sideways, Codsworth, ya ever get jealous watchin’ MJR pump Piper full of his load while I ride his fingers like a Brahmin in heat? That liberal cunt always screamin’ loud enough to attract every mutant in the Commonwealth. Codsworth: Oh my, madam, while I lack the appropriate...  for such carnal envy, I do find Piper’s vocal enthusiasm quite... unhinged. Though I must say, your own performance last evening—those walls  have plasma burns from where you kicked the mattress through the fucking ceiling. Cait: Ha! Tryin’ to butter me up, ya rusty bucket? Bet you’d love a front-row seat while MJR bends me over a wrecked car and makes me howl louder than a deathclaw in a blender. Fuckin’ patriot shit gets me —nothing like guttin’ raiders all day and gettin’ railed all night. Codsworth: Whilst I appreciate the...

Cait: Tch, save the polite act, rustbucket. We both know you’re just waitin’ for MJR to short-circuit your circuits by accident when I’m riding him too hard next to your charging port. Codsworth: I shall endeavor to… lubricate my hinges in preparation for the inevitable structural damage. Do try not to crack the floorboards , madam. Cait: Pfft, floorboards? Next time I’m cracking the whole damn . Now shut up and keep watch—I gotta think up new ways to wreck MJR before them raider sluts ambush us again.
